mnemonics: K-Means is like Kitchen - Many Items Need Sorting Easy
DBSCAN is like Detectivebirds - Building Special Connections Always
keyPoints: Introduction to Clustering Approaches: K-Means, Hierarchical, DBSCAN, Partitional Clustering
Proximity Measures: Euclidean Distance, Manhattan Distance, Minkowski Distance
Hierarchical Clustering Algorithms: Agglomerative, Divisive, Single Linkage, Complete Linkage
Partitional Clustering Algorithms: K-Means, Hierarchical Clustering
Key Characteristics of K-Means: Unsupervised, Non-Deterministic, Time-Efficient
Key Characteristics of Hierarchical Clustering: Supervised, Deterministic, Scalable
Key Characteristics of DBSCAN: Unsupervised, Deterministic, Robust
